creator: croyle@gelemna.ft-wayne.in.us
text:
Mikhail Teterin <mi@aldan.algebra.com> writes:
 
 > 	The present version of the port is for AStyle-1.6.0. Author's
 > 	latest is 1.8.2 as of March 18, 1999.
 
 Yeah, I'm running behind.  For one thing, I don't have a machine
 running -current at the moment.
 
 
 > 	My version also removes the dependency on the EGCS compiler,
 > 	which, I believe, makes the port a lot easier to install.
 
 1.6.0 flat would not compile with gcc 2.7.*.  Now that -current has
 egcs as the system compiler, the egcs port doesn't need to be
 installed to build it *on -current*.  The compiler for 3.* hasn't
 changed, and isn't likely to anytime soon.
 
 Need to look at the system version at build time, and only have egcs
 as a build dependency if the system is 3-stable or older.  I haven't
 had time to look into how to do that.
 
 > 	The uuencoded tar-ball of the new version of the port is here:
 
 Unencoded diffs please.  I'm not even going to bother uudecoding
 these.
 -- 
 I've always wanted to be a dilettante, but I've never quite been ready
 to make the commitment.
